name: Lava animated 4f
description: Looping 4-frame lava tile, 16x16. Bright crackling magma with shifting cracks.
rule_summary: Base dark lava, animated cracks of bright orange, shifting and pulsing across 4 frames. Frame durations 150ms = 600ms loop (faster than water).
source: General arcade lava + Spelunky lava reference

layers.name: lava_base
layers.purpose: Full 16x16 dark lava base across all 4 frames.

layers.name: cracks
layers.purpose: Glowing crack pattern. Frame 1 = thin, Frame 2 = brightest, Frame 3 = wide, Frame 4 = fading.

layers.name: hot_spots
layers.purpose: Pulsing bright spots (yellow-white) at crack intersections.
